description_long: This object is a decorative desk set featuring a central bronze bust of a man in a cap, mounted on a rectangular marble base. Flanking the bust are two ornate, lidded inkwells, also made of bronze, each with intricate detailing and rounded tops. The base is semi-circular at the front, with a flat back and carved relief patterns along the curved edge. The marble has a dark green hue with lighter veining, giving it a luxurious and classic appearance. The bust is finely sculpted, showing detailed facial features and clothing folds. The overall design suggests a historical or commemorative theme, likely intended for display in a formal or public setting.
description: A marble and bronze desk set with a central bust and two ornate lidded inkwells, featuring detailed relief and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bust's face, both inkwells, and the semi-circular marble base with carved relief.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the left inkwell, with the marble base's thickness visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bust and both inkwells, with the flat back of the marble base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bust's profile and the right inkwell, with the marble base's side detail.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a man with two ornate inkwells
attribute_location_context: No visible context; likely intended for indoor display such as an office, study, or museum.
